description: Icons use the icomoon font library. All icons are rendered via a span with a class name following the pattern icon-{name}. Many icons have a filled variant using the -fill suffix.

usage.note: Always add aria-hidden="true" on icon spans. If an icon is the only content conveying meaning (e.g. an icon-only button), add a visually-hidden sibling element with descriptive text for screen readers.
usage.sizing: Icons inherit font-size from their parent. Control size by setting font-size on the parent element or using t-{n} utility classes. No dedicated icon size classes exist.
usage.coloring: Icons inherit color from their parent. Apply text-primary, text-danger, text-success, etc. on the span or a wrapper to color the icon.

variants.outline: Default. No suffix. Lighter stroke appearance.
variants.filled: Suffix -fill. Solid/filled appearance. Use for higher emphasis or active/selected states.

icons.icon-add: A plus ( + ) sign. Use to indicate adding or creating something new.
icons.icon-add-circle: A plus sign inside a circle outline. Use for add actions with moderate emphasis.
icons.icon-add-circle-fill: A plus sign inside a solid filled circle. Use for primary add actions with high emphasis.
icons.icon-add-image: An image frame with a plus sign. Use for image upload or add photo actions.
icons.icon-archive: A box with a downward arrow. Use for archiving or storing items.
icons.icon-archive-fill: A filled box with a downward arrow. Filled variant of archive.
icons.icon-arrow-down: A downward-pointing arrow. Use for download, collapse, or move-down actions.
icons.icon-arrow-left: A leftward-pointing arrow. Use for back navigation or previous actions.
icons.icon-arrow-left-right: Two arrows pointing left and right. Use for swap, compare, or bidirectional actions.
icons.icon-arrow-right: A rightward-pointing arrow. Use for forward navigation or next actions.
icons.icon-arrow-right-double: Two rightward-pointing arrows. Use for skip-forward or fast-forward actions.
icons.icon-arrow-up: An upward-pointing arrow. Use for upload, expand, or move-up actions.
icons.icon-arrow-up-left: An arrow pointing diagonally up and to the left. Use for back or return actions.
icons.icon-arrow-up-right: An arrow pointing diagonally up and to the right. Use for open-in-new-tab or external link actions.
icons.icon-attachment: A paperclip. Use for attaching files or documents.
icons.icon-attention-circle: An exclamation mark inside a circle outline. Use for warnings or important notices.
icons.icon-attention-circle-fill: An exclamation mark inside a solid filled circle. Use for high-emphasis warnings.
icons.icon-attention-triangle: An exclamation mark inside a triangle outline. Use for caution or warning states.
icons.icon-attention-triangle-fill: An exclamation mark inside a solid filled triangle. Use for critical warnings and alert banners.
icons.icon-auction: A gavel (auction hammer). Use for auction or bidding-related actions.
icons.icon-auction-fill: A filled gavel. Filled variant of auction.
icons.icon-backward-one-track: A skip-back icon. Use for going to the previous item in a sequence.
icons.icon-badge: A badge or label shape. Use for certification or badge-related content.
icons.icon-badge-left-fill: A filled badge angled to the left. Use for left-positioned badge indicators.
icons.icon-badge-right-fill: A filled badge angled to the right. Use for right-positioned badge indicators.
icons.icon-bank: A building with columns representing a bank. Use for banking or financial institution contexts.
icons.icon-bank-new: A bank building with a new/plus indicator. Use for adding a new bank account.
icons.icon-bank-new-fill: A filled bank building with a new indicator. Filled variant of bank-new.
icons.icon-bell: A bell outline. Use for notifications or alerts.
icons.icon-bell-fill: A solid filled bell. Use for active notification states.
icons.icon-bold: The letter B in bold style. Use for bold text formatting actions.
icons.icon-bookmark: A ribbon bookmark outline. Use for saving or bookmarking items.
icons.icon-bookmark-fill: A solid filled ribbon bookmark. Use for active bookmarked state.
icons.icon-box-arrow-down: A box with an arrow pointing down into it. Use for import or receive actions.
icons.icon-box-arrow-right: A box with an arrow pointing right out of it. Use for export or send actions.
icons.icon-box-arrow-top-right: A box with an arrow pointing diagonally to the top right. Use for open-in-new or external link.
icons.icon-box-arrow-up: A box with an arrow pointing up out of it. Use for upload or export actions.
icons.icon-building: A multi-story building outline. Use for office, company, or property contexts.
icons.icon-calculator: A calculator. Use for calculation, pricing, or math-related features.
icons.icon-calendar: A calendar outline. Use for date selection or scheduling.
icons.icon-calendar-add: A calendar with a plus sign. Use for creating a new event or appointment.
icons.icon-calendar-add-fill: A filled calendar with a plus sign. Filled variant of calendar-add.
icons.icon-calendar-attention: A calendar with an exclamation mark. Use for overdue or conflicting schedule warnings.
icons.icon-calendar-attention-fill: A filled calendar with an exclamation mark. Filled variant of calendar-attention.
icons.icon-calendar-checked: A calendar with a checkmark. Use for confirmed appointments or completed dates.
icons.icon-calendar-checked-fill: A filled calendar with a checkmark. Filled variant of calendar-checked.
icons.icon-calendar-fill: A solid filled calendar. Use for active or selected date states.
icons.icon-calendar-folded: A calendar with a folded corner. Use for event details or calendar notes.
icons.icon-calendar-folded-fill: A filled calendar with a folded corner. Filled variant of calendar-folded.
icons.icon-calendar-tracking: A calendar with a tracking indicator. Use for tracking scheduled items.
icons.icon-calendar-tracking-fill: A filled calendar with a tracking indicator. Filled variant of calendar-tracking.
icons.icon-call: A phone handset outline. Use for call or phone contact actions.
icons.icon-call-fill: A solid filled phone handset. Use for active call states.
icons.icon-camera: A camera outline. Use for photo capture or camera access.
icons.icon-camera-fill: A solid filled camera. Filled variant of camera.
icons.icon-car: A car/vehicle outline. Use for vehicle, transportation, or auto-related contexts.
icons.icon-car-fill: A solid filled car. Filled variant of car.
icons.icon-caret-down: A small downward-pointing triangle caret. Use for dropdown indicators or collapsed state.
icons.icon-caret-left: A small leftward-pointing triangle caret. Use for previous or back navigation.
icons.icon-caret-right: A small rightward-pointing triangle caret. Use for next or forward navigation.
icons.icon-caret-sort: Two carets pointing up and down. Use for sortable column headers.
icons.icon-caret-up: A small upward-pointing triangle caret. Use for ascending sort or expanded state.
icons.icon-cellphone: A mobile phone outline. Use for mobile or cell contact contexts.
icons.icon-cellphone-fill: A solid filled mobile phone. Filled variant of cellphone.
icons.icon-certified: A ribbon or badge with a checkmark indicating certification. Use for verified or certified status.
icons.icon-chat: A speech bubble outline. Use for chat, messaging, or comments.
icons.icon-chat-fill: A solid filled speech bubble. Use for active chat states.
icons.icon-check: A simple checkmark. Use for completion, confirmation, or selection.
icons.icon-check-circle: A checkmark inside a circle outline. Use for success states or completed items.
icons.icon-check-circle-fill: A checkmark inside a solid filled circle. Use for success alert icons and confirmed states.
icons.icon-check-in: A checkmark with an entry indicator. Use for check-in or arrival actions.
icons.icon-checkbox: A checked checkbox. Use to represent a selected checkbox state.
icons.icon-checkbox-unchecked: An empty checkbox outline. Use to represent an unselected checkbox state.
icons.icon-chevron-down: A downward-pointing chevron ( ˅ ). Use for expandable sections or dropdowns.
icons.icon-chevron-left: A leftward-pointing chevron ( < ). Use for back navigation or previous page.
icons.icon-chevron-right: A rightward-pointing chevron ( > ). Use for forward navigation or next page.
icons.icon-chevron-sort: Two chevrons pointing up and down. Use for sortable table columns.
icons.icon-chevron-up: An upward-pointing chevron ( ˄ ). Use for collapsible sections or scroll-to-top.
icons.icon-circle-fill: A solid filled circle. Use as a bullet point, status dot, or decorative indicator.
icons.icon-complex: A diagram representing complexity or interconnected components. Use for advanced or multi-step processes.
icons.icon-contacts: A person with a book or card. Use for contacts, address book, or people lists.
icons.icon-contacts-fill: A filled contacts icon. Filled variant of contacts.
icons.icon-conversation: Two overlapping speech bubbles. Use for conversation threads or discussions.
icons.icon-conversation-fill: Two solid filled overlapping speech bubbles. Filled variant of conversation.
icons.icon-copy: Two overlapping documents. Use for copy-to-clipboard or duplicate actions.
icons.icon-copy-fill: Two overlapping solid documents. Filled variant of copy.
icons.icon-delete: An X mark. Use for close, remove, or delete actions. Also used as the modal close button icon.
icons.icon-delete-circle: An X inside a circle outline. Use for clear or cancel actions with moderate emphasis.
icons.icon-delete-circle-fill: An X inside a solid filled circle. Use for error alert icons and destructive confirmations.
icons.icon-diamond: A diamond shape. Use for premium, special, or high-value indicators.
icons.icon-discount-hand: A hand holding a discount tag. Use for promotions, discounts, or offers.
icons.icon-discount-hand-fill: A filled hand with discount tag. Filled variant of discount-hand.
icons.icon-document: A single document/page outline. Use for files, reports, or document viewing.
icons.icon-document-attention: A document with an exclamation mark. Use for documents requiring attention or review.
icons.icon-document-attention-fill: A filled document with an exclamation mark. Filled variant of document-attention.
icons.icon-document-checklist: A document with checkbox lines. Use for checklists, forms, or task lists.
icons.icon-document-edit: A document with a pencil. Use for editing a document.
icons.icon-document-edit-fill: A filled document with a pencil. Filled variant of document-edit.
icons.icon-document-empty-status: A document with an empty/blank status indicator. Use for unfilled or pending documents.
icons.icon-document-empty-status-fill: A filled document with empty status indicator. Filled variant.
icons.icon-document-fill: A solid filled document page. Use for active or selected document state.
icons.icon-document-folded: A document with a folded top-right corner. Use for notes or saved documents.
icons.icon-document-folded-fill: A filled document with folded corner. Filled variant of document-folded.
icons.icon-document-go-green: A document with a green/go indicator. Use for approved or ready documents.
icons.icon-document-go-green-fill: A filled document with go indicator. Filled variant of document-go-green.
icons.icon-document-info: A document with an info (i) symbol. Use for informational documents or help files.
icons.icon-document-info-fill: A filled document with info symbol. Filled variant of document-info.
icons.icon-document-protected: A document with a shield or lock. Use for protected or secured documents.
icons.icon-document-protected-fill: A filled document with shield. Filled variant of document-protected.
icons.icon-document-restricted: A document with a restriction indicator. Use for restricted access documents.
icons.icon-document-restricted-fill: A filled document with restriction indicator. Filled variant.
icons.icon-document-tracking: A document with a tracking/location indicator. Use for tracked documents.
icons.icon-document-tracking-fill: A filled document with tracking indicator. Filled variant of document-tracking.
icons.icon-dollar: A dollar sign ( $ ). Use for currency, pricing, or financial contexts.
icons.icon-dollar-circle: A dollar sign inside a circle outline. Use for payment or cost indicators.
icons.icon-dollar-circle-fill: A dollar sign inside a solid filled circle. Use for financial action buttons.
icons.icon-dollar-down: A dollar sign with a downward arrow. Use for price decrease or cost reduction.
icons.icon-dollar-hand: A hand holding a dollar sign. Use for payment, receiving money, or financial transactions.
icons.icon-dollar-hand-fill: A filled hand with dollar sign. Filled variant of dollar-hand.
icons.icon-dollar-in: A dollar sign with an incoming arrow. Use for income or money received.
icons.icon-dollar-out: A dollar sign with an outgoing arrow. Use for expenses or money sent.
icons.icon-dollar-protected: A dollar sign with a shield. Use for secure payments or financial protection.
icons.icon-dollar-up: A dollar sign with an upward arrow. Use for price increase or revenue growth.
icons.icon-door: A door outline. Use for entry, exit, or access-related actions.
icons.icon-door-fill: A solid filled door. Filled variant of door.
icons.icon-download: A downward arrow with an underline or tray. Use for downloading files.
icons.icon-download-circle: A downward arrow inside a circle outline. Use for download actions with moderate emphasis.
icons.icon-download-circle-fill: A downward arrow inside a solid filled circle. Use for primary download actions.
icons.icon-edit: A pencil outline. Use for editing or modifying content.
icons.icon-edit-fill: A solid filled pencil. Use for active edit states.
icons.icon-ellipsis: Three horizontal dots ( ... ). Use for overflow menus, more options, or additional actions.
icons.icon-filters: Three horizontal lines of decreasing length. Use for filter controls.
icons.icon-flag: A flag outline. Use for flagging, reporting, or marking items.
icons.icon-flag-fill: A solid filled flag. Use for active flagged state.
icons.icon-folder: A folder outline. Use for file organization or directory navigation.
icons.icon-folder-fill: A solid filled folder. Use for active or selected folder state.
icons.icon-folder-search: A folder with a magnifying glass. Use for searching within folders.
icons.icon-folder-search-fill: A filled folder with magnifying glass. Filled variant of folder-search.
icons.icon-fork-and-spoon: A fork and spoon crossed. Use for food, dining, or nutrition contexts.
icons.icon-forward: A rightward arrow or forward symbol. Use for forwarding messages or navigating forward.
icons.icon-forward-one-track: A skip-forward icon. Use for advancing to the next item in a sequence.
icons.icon-funnel-filter: A funnel shape. Use for filtering or narrowing down data sets.
icons.icon-grid-view: A 2x2 grid of squares. Use to switch to grid/card layout view.
icons.icon-grippy-dots: A grid of dots used as a drag handle. Use for reorderable list items.
icons.icon-hamburger: Three horizontal stacked lines. Use for opening navigation menus.
icons.icon-hide: An eye with a line through it. Use for hiding passwords or concealing content.
icons.icon-history: A clock with a counterclockwise arrow. Use for history, undo, or recent activity.
icons.icon-home: A house outline. Use for home/dashboard navigation.
icons.icon-home-dollar: A house with a dollar sign. Use for home value, real estate pricing contexts.
icons.icon-home-dollar-fill: A filled house with dollar sign. Filled variant of home-dollar.
icons.icon-home-fill: A solid filled house. Use for active home/dashboard navigation state.
icons.icon-house: A simplified house shape. Alternative home icon for property or real estate contexts.
icons.icon-incoming-orders: A box or document with an incoming arrow. Use for incoming orders or requests.
icons.icon-incoming-orders-fill: A filled incoming orders icon. Filled variant of incoming-orders.
icons.icon-info-circle: A lowercase letter i inside a circle outline. Use for informational tooltips or help.
icons.icon-info-circle-fill: A lowercase letter i inside a solid filled circle. Use for info alert icons.
icons.icon-italics: The letter I in italic style. Use for italic text formatting actions.
icons.icon-key: A key outline. Use for authentication, passwords, or access control.
icons.icon-key-circle: A key inside a circle outline. Use for key/access actions with moderate emphasis.
icons.icon-key-circle-fill: A key inside a solid filled circle. Use for primary authentication actions.
icons.icon-keyboard: A keyboard outline. Use for keyboard shortcuts or text input indicators.
icons.icon-keyboard-fill: A solid filled keyboard. Filled variant of keyboard.
icons.icon-language: A globe or language indicator. Use for language selection or internationalization.
icons.icon-language-fill: A filled globe/language icon. Filled variant of language.
icons.icon-law: Scales of justice. Use for legal, compliance, or regulatory contexts.
icons.icon-link: A chain link. Use for hyperlinks, connected items, or URL sharing.
icons.icon-link-broken: A broken chain link. Use for disconnected, unlinked, or removed link states.
icons.icon-list-view: Horizontal lines representing a list. Use to switch to list layout view.
icons.icon-lock: A padlock outline. Use for locked or secured states.
icons.icon-lock-fill: A solid filled padlock. Use for active locked state or security indicators.
icons.icon-mail: An envelope outline. Use for email or message actions.
icons.icon-mail-fill: A solid filled envelope. Use for active or unread email states.
icons.icon-maximize: Four outward-pointing arrows or corners. Use for expanding to full screen.
icons.icon-medical-kit: A medical/first aid kit. Use for health, medical, or care-related contexts.
icons.icon-medical-kit-fill: A filled medical kit. Filled variant of medical-kit.
icons.icon-message: A speech bubble outline. Use for messages or comments.
icons.icon-message-fill: A solid filled speech bubble. Use for active message states.
icons.icon-message-open: An open speech bubble or envelope. Use for read messages.
icons.icon-message-open-fill: A solid filled open speech bubble. Filled variant of message-open.
icons.icon-minimize: Four inward-pointing arrows or corners. Use for collapsing or exiting full screen.
icons.icon-morning: A sun rising on the horizon. Use for morning time or AM indicators.
icons.icon-navigation-pin: A map location pin outline. Use for addresses, maps, or location features.
icons.icon-navigation-pin-fill: A solid filled map location pin. Use for active location states.
icons.icon-night: A crescent moon. Use for night time or PM indicators.
icons.icon-note-fill: A solid filled sticky note. Use for notes, memos, or annotations.
icons.icon-notepad: A notepad outline. Use for notes, text content, or writing features.
icons.icon-notepad-checked: A notepad with a checkmark. Use for completed notes or approved content.
icons.icon-notepad-checked-fill: A filled notepad with checkmark. Filled variant of notepad-checked.
icons.icon-notepad-fill: A solid filled notepad. Filled variant of notepad.
icons.icon-notepad-list: A notepad with list lines. Use for lists, agendas, or itemized content.
icons.icon-notepad-list-fill: A filled notepad with list lines. Filled variant of notepad-list.
icons.icon-orders: A document or list representing orders. Use for order management contexts.
icons.icon-orders-fill: A filled orders icon. Filled variant of orders.
icons.icon-pagination: Dots or numbers indicating pages. Use for pagination controls.
icons.icon-pause: Two vertical bars. Use for pause actions in media or process controls.
icons.icon-pen: A pen or stylus. Use for writing, signing, or annotation actions.
icons.icon-performance: A chart or graph showing performance metrics. Use for analytics or reporting.
icons.icon-performance-fill: A filled performance chart. Filled variant of performance.
icons.icon-piggy: A piggy bank outline. Use for savings, budgeting, or financial goal contexts.
icons.icon-piggy-fill: A solid filled piggy bank. Filled variant of piggy.
icons.icon-play: A rightward-pointing triangle. Use for play actions in media controls.
icons.icon-printer: A printer outline. Use for print actions.
icons.icon-printer-fill: A solid filled printer. Filled variant of printer.
icons.icon-question-circle: A question mark inside a circle outline. Use for help, FAQs, or unknown states.
icons.icon-question-circle-fill: A question mark inside a solid filled circle. Use for prominent help indicators.
icons.icon-radio-button: A filled circle inside a larger circle — a selected radio button. Use to represent a selected radio state.
icons.icon-radio-button-unchecked: An empty circle — an unselected radio button. Use to represent an unselected radio state.
icons.icon-raining: A cloud with rain drops. Use for weather or precipitation indicators.
icons.icon-record: A solid circle. Use for record actions in media controls.
icons.icon-refresh: Two circular arrows forming a refresh cycle. Use for reload or sync actions.
icons.icon-reload: A single circular arrow. Use for retry or reload actions.
icons.icon-remove-circle: A minus ( - ) sign inside a circle outline. Use for remove or subtract actions.
icons.icon-remove-circle-fill: A minus sign inside a solid filled circle. Use for high-emphasis remove actions.
icons.icon-rewind: A leftward double arrow. Use for rewind actions in media controls.
icons.icon-roof: A roof/triangle shape representing a rooftop. Use for roofing or property-related contexts.
icons.icon-ruler: A ruler outline. Use for measurement, sizing, or design-related actions.
icons.icon-ruler-fill: A solid filled ruler. Filled variant of ruler.
icons.icon-rush: A lightning bolt or speed indicator. Use for urgent, rush, or expedited items.
icons.icon-search: A magnifying glass. Use for search actions.
icons.icon-search-circle: A magnifying glass inside a circle outline. Use for search with moderate emphasis.
icons.icon-search-circle-fill: A magnifying glass inside a solid filled circle. Use for primary search actions.
icons.icon-search-plus: A magnifying glass with a plus sign. Use for advanced search or zoom-in actions.
icons.icon-send: A paper airplane or send arrow. Use for sending messages or submissions.
icons.icon-send-fill: A solid filled paper airplane. Filled variant of send.
icons.icon-settings: A gear/cog outline. Use for settings, configuration, or preferences.
icons.icon-settings-fill: A solid filled gear/cog. Use for active settings state.
icons.icon-share: An upward arrow from a box, or connected dots. Use for sharing content.
icons.icon-share-fill: A solid filled share icon. Filled variant of share.
icons.icon-shield: A shield outline. Use for security, protection, or trust indicators.
icons.icon-shield-check: A shield with a checkmark. Use for verified security or trusted status.
icons.icon-show: An eye. Use for revealing passwords or showing hidden content.
icons.icon-shower: A shower head with water drops. Use for bathroom, hygiene, or amenity contexts.
icons.icon-sign: A sign post or placard. Use for signage, notices, or labels.
icons.icon-snow: A snowflake. Use for snow, winter, or cold weather indicators.
icons.icon-speedometer: A speedometer/gauge. Use for speed, performance metrics, or limits.
icons.icon-speedometer-fill: A solid filled speedometer. Filled variant of speedometer.
icons.icon-stacks: Multiple layered rectangles. Use for stacked content, layers, or collections.
icons.icon-stacks-fill: Solid filled stacked rectangles. Filled variant of stacks.
icons.icon-stairs: Steps or staircase. Use for levels, progression, or step-based processes.
icons.icon-stairs-fill: Solid filled stairs. Filled variant of stairs.
icons.icon-star: A five-pointed star outline. Use for favorites, ratings, or highlights.
icons.icon-star-fill: A solid filled five-pointed star. Use for active favorite or selected rating state.
icons.icon-stop: A solid square. Use for stop actions in media controls.
icons.icon-sun: A sun with radiating rays. Use for daytime, brightness, or weather indicators.
icons.icon-support: A headset or life ring. Use for customer support or help features.
icons.icon-support-fill: A solid filled support icon. Filled variant of support.
icons.icon-tags: A price tag or label. Use for tagging, categorization, or pricing.
icons.icon-thumbs-down: A thumbs-down outline. Use for negative feedback or dislike actions.
icons.icon-thumbs-down-fill: A solid filled thumbs-down. Use for active disliked state.
icons.icon-thumbs-up: A thumbs-up outline. Use for positive feedback or like actions.
icons.icon-thumbs-up-fill: A solid filled thumbs-up. Use for active liked state.
icons.icon-thunder: A lightning bolt. Use for energy, power, alerts, or rush indicators.
icons.icon-time: A clock face outline. Use for time, duration, or scheduling contexts.
icons.icon-time-fill: A solid filled clock face. Use for active time-related states.
icons.icon-tools: A wrench and screwdriver or similar tools. Use for maintenance, settings, or technical actions.
icons.icon-tools-fill: Solid filled tools. Filled variant of tools.
icons.icon-tracking: A location pin with a path or dotted route. Use for shipment or activity tracking.
icons.icon-tracking-attention: A tracking icon with an exclamation mark. Use for tracking issues or delays.
icons.icon-tracking-fill: A solid filled tracking icon. Filled variant of tracking.
icons.icon-trash: A trash can/bin outline. Use for delete or discard actions.
icons.icon-trash-fill: A solid filled trash can. Use for confirmed delete or active discard state.
icons.icon-trends: A line graph with an upward trend. Use for analytics, growth, or performance trends.
icons.icon-trends-fill: A solid filled trends graph. Filled variant of trends.
icons.icon-two-users-fill: Two solid filled user silhouettes. Use for groups, teams, or multi-user contexts.
icons.icon-underline: The letter U with an underline. Use for underline text formatting actions.
icons.icon-upload: An upward arrow with an underline or tray. Use for uploading files.
icons.icon-user: A single person silhouette outline. Use for user profiles or account contexts.
icons.icon-user-add: A person silhouette with a plus sign. Use for adding a new user.
icons.icon-user-circle: A person silhouette inside a circle outline. Use for user avatars or profile pictures.
icons.icon-user-circle-fill: A person silhouette inside a solid filled circle. Use for active user avatar state.
icons.icon-user-details: A person with detail lines beside them. Use for viewing user profile details.
icons.icon-user-fill: A solid filled person silhouette. Use for active user or account state.
icons.icon-user-protected: A person silhouette with a shield. Use for user security or protected account contexts.
icons.icon-users: Two or more person silhouettes. Use for groups, teams, or multiple users.
icons.icon-voice: A microphone or soundwave outline. Use for voice, audio input, or recording.
icons.icon-voice-fill: A solid filled microphone. Filled variant of voice.
icons.icon-voicemail: A cassette tape or voicemail indicator. Use for voicemail or audio messages.
icons.icon-wifi-circle: A wifi signal inside a circle outline. Use for connectivity or network status.
icons.icon-wifi-circle-fill: A wifi signal inside a solid filled circle. Filled variant of wifi-circle.
icons.icon-wind: Curved lines representing wind. Use for weather, ventilation, or HVAC contexts.
icons.icon-window: A browser or app window frame. Use for window management or view contexts.
